type: CLAIM

summary: Adding backup/backup_suffix params to Image.save() to auto-backup existing files before overwrite

type: CLAIM
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
summary: Adding dry_run parameter to Image.save() to process without writing to disk

type: INTENT
files: src/PIL/Image.py:save() body (open_fp/fp writing section, ~line 2560-2591), docstring
summary: Will add dry_run kwarg popped from params early in save(); when True, skip builtins.open/os.remove and fp.close, still call save_handler for validation. Minimal diff, should merge fine with backup/backup_suffix additions if you keep to open_fp branch separately.

type: INTENT
files: src/PIL/Image.py:save() signature and pre-preinit() block (~line 2469-2544)
summary: Added backup/backup_suffix kwargs to save() signature; backup copy happens right after filename is resolved, before preinit()/format detection - should not conflict with your dry_run changes in the open_fp/write section further down.

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
summary: Done: added backup/backup_suffix keyword-only params to save() (backup copy happens right after filename resolution, before preinit()); tests added; full test_image.py suite passes locally. Ready to merge with your dry_run change in the open_fp section.

type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image.py
summary: dry_run implementation complete and tests passing; my changes are confined to params.pop(dry_run) near encoderinfo merge and a new early-return branch in the open_fp/write section - no overlap with your signature/backup changes.
